title: Hypothesis about the present
subtitle: Use si tuviera..., haría... for imagined present.
overview: This expresses imagined situations, advice, and preferences.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Si tuviera más tiempo, viajaría más.
If I had more time, I would travel more.
Si viviera cerca, iría a pie.
If I lived nearby, I would go on foot.
Si fuera posible, cambiaría la fecha.
If it were possible, I would change the date.

items.es: Si tuviera más tiempo, practicaría conversación todos los días.
items.en: If I had more time, I would practice conversation every day.

items.es: Si viviera en España, escucharía español en la calle constantemente.
items.en: If I lived in Spain, I would hear Spanish in the street constantly.

items.es: Si fuera más barato, elegiría el tren.
items.en: If it were cheaper, I would choose the train.

items.es: Si pudiera, trabajaría menos horas durante una temporada.
items.en: If I could, I would work fewer hours for a while.

items.es: Si estuviera en tu lugar, pediría una segunda opinión.
items.en: If I were in your place, I would ask for a second opinion.
